endpoints.name: Get ContentDefinitions
endpoints.description:
Gets a collection of ContentDefinitions. When successful, the response is a PagedResponse of ContentDefinitions.
            If unsuccessful, an appropriate ApiError is returned.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: Create a ContentDefinition
endpoints.description:
Creates a ContentDefinition.  The body of the POST is the ContentDefinition to create.
            The ContentDefinitionID will be assigned on creation of the Job.  When successful, the response
            is the JobID.  If unsuccessful, an appropriate ApiError is returned.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: Get a ContentDefinition by ID
endpoints.description:
Gets a ContentDefinition by ID. When successful, the response is the requested ContentDefinition.
            If unsuccessful, an appropriate ApiError is returned.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{CONTENTDEFINITIONID}} with a real contentdefinitionid.

endpoints.name: Update a ContentDefinition
endpoints.description:
Updates a ContentDefinition.  The body of the PUT is the updated ContentDefinition.  
            When successful, the response is empty.  If unsuccessful, an appropriate ApiError is returned.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{CONTENTDEFINITIONID}} with a real contentdefinitionid.

endpoints.name: Delete a ContentDefinition
endpoints.description:
Deletes an ContentDefinition. When successful, the response is empty.  If unsuccessful, an appropriate
            ApiError is returned.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{CONTENTDEFINITIONID}} with a real contentdefinitionid.

endpoints.name: Get a paged response of file metadata.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: Create the metadata for a file before uploading. The State of the File should be 'Created'.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: Gets a file's metadata.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Update the metadata for a file. Size may not be modified by the client.
endpoints.description:
Update the metadata for a file. Size may not be modified by the client. 
                Set status to 'Available' to publish a file. The file must be uploaded.
                Set status to 'Created' to reset a file's contents and re-upload. 
                A file may only be 'Removed' by the DELETE method.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Mark a file as 'Removed'. Disables download of the file and hides metadata from GET all method
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Download the contents of a file. The current State of the File should be 'Available'.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Upload the contents of a file. The current State of the File should be 'Created'.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get a paged response of file metadata.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: Create the metadata for a file before uploading. The State should be 'Created'.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: Gets a file's metadata.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get a paged response of GlobalImage.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: Create the metadata for a GlobalImage before uploading. The State should be 'Created'.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: Gets a GlobalImage's metadata.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Update the metadata for an image.
endpoints.description:
Update the metadata for an image. Size may not be modified by the client. 
                Set status to 'Available' to publish an image. Both the image and thumbnail must be uploaded.
                Set status to 'Created' to reset an image's contents and re-upload. 
                A file may only be 'Removed' by the DELETE method.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Mark a file as 'Removed'. Disables download of the image and hides metadata from GET all method
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Download the contents of a GlobalImage. The current State of the GlobalImage should be 'Available'.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Upload the contents of a GlobalImage. The current State of the File for the GlobalImage should be 'Created'.
endpoints.description:
Both the image and thumbnail must be uploaded.
                Set isFullImage = 'True' for Full Image, isFullImage = 'False' for Thumbnail
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

Creates a UserContentDefinition.  The body of the POST is the UserContentDefinition to create.

endpoints.description:

            If unsuccessful, an appropriate ApiError is returned.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{USERCONTENTDEFINITIONID}} with a real usercontentdefinitionid.

endpoints.name: Delete a UserContentDefinition
endpoints.description:
Deletes an UserContentDefinition. When successful, the response is empty.  If unsuccessful, an appropriate
            ApiError is returned.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{USERCONTENTDEFINITIONID}} with a real usercontentdefinitionid.
